nodes.label: Essay Grader Worker
nodes.rationale: Cloudflare Worker proxy so the static site never sees the Gemini API key: the site POSTs the essay, the Worker calls Gemini and returns the assessment JSON. Rejects essays over 20k chars or under ~20 words, and surfaces Gemini 429 as 'daily free grading limit reached'. CORS only restricts browsers - direct curl abuse is accepted as a trade-off for a free-tier study tool, with Cloudflare rate limiting or Turnstile as the escalation path.

nodes.label: Gemini Flash (free tier)
nodes.rationale: Chosen because the free tier (~1,500 requests/day, no credit card) is enough for a study tool; default model gemini-2.5-flash via GEMINI_MODEL var. Trade-off: free-tier Gemini may use submitted student essays for model improvement.

nodes.label: PUBLIC_GRADER_URL Variable
nodes.rationale: Env/Actions variable pointing the site at the deployed Worker URL; set locally in .env and in GitHub Actions repo variables for production builds.

nodes.label: Offline Sample Grader Fallback
nodes.rationale: With PUBLIC_GRADER_URL unset the site quietly falls back to the offline sample grader - graceful degradation so nothing breaks without the Worker.

nodes.label: ALLOWED_ORIGINS CORS Config
nodes.rationale: Comma-separated origins allowed by CORS (wrangler.jsonc vars); must be extended if the site moves to a custom domain. Only protects against browser use, not direct curl.
